chapter_title.en: Chapter on the First Matters to Be Addressed From Estate of the Deceased

text: 5439 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "اَلْكَفَنُ مِنْ جَمِيعِ اَلْمَالِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5439 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan from Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), who said:
"The shroud (for burial) is to be provided from the entirety of the wealth (of the deceased)."
